title: tweet-original
description: Compose and post an original tweet or thread from the user's account.

topic.description: What to post about -- a sentence or paragraph of context

max_length.description: Character limit. 280 for single tweet, higher for threads.

thread_count.description: Number of tweets if angle is 'thread'

_anti_patterns: Don't iterate on media styles. Ask preference first or default to text-only.
No corporate speak. Run the 'would I say this to a friend?' test.
Numbers must be verified before posting. Vague > Wrong.
